task_updates.executor_notes: Ran the mandatory throwaway pinned-group interior-boundary repro as a temporary vitest file under `src/tools/video-editor/`, confirmed it passed, and deleted both temporary repro files afterward. Then ran the required targeted resize modules and the full video-editor suite. The targeted run passed (`3` files / `31` tests), and the full video-editor suite passed (`42` files / `222` tests). `npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit` still fails, but the reported errors are in non-video-editor areas such as `src/domains/*` and `src/tools/travel-between-images/*`; a follow-up grep over the typecheck output found no `src/tools/video-editor/` errors, so there are no new video-editor type regressions from this cleanup.
commands_run: npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts $(rg --files src/tools/video-editor | rg '\.test\.(ts|tsx)$')
